attacking_style: Opportunistic early breakaway rider who seeks stage results from long-range moves rather than finale attacks. Positioning in breaks suggests improving race craft over career.
team_tactics: Appears to operate with freedom in breakaways rather than strict domestique duties. Team likely grants autonomy for stage hunting when GC is not in play.
terrain_preference: Breakaway-friendly stages where early moves stick. Vulnerable in high-speed peloton scenarios where positioning becomes critical and crash risk increases.
vulnerability: Peloton positioning remains a liability - crash abandonment suggests difficulty maintaining safe position in nervous bunch racing. Lacks finishing speed if breakaway is caught.
key_patterns: Seeks early breakaways for stage results rather than working as pure domestique (2 races)
Crash risk elevated in peloton situations; abandoned Vuelta 2018 after being hit (2 races)
Career trajectory shows improvement: podium finish 2023 despite zero prior wins (2 races)
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Giro podium from break represents clear progression from 2018 domestique role, showing enhanced breakaway management
